# FINDINGS — Novel Results Catalog

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by bin/extract-findings; do not hand-edit. -->
<!-- Walks every promoted segment's `## Findings` section. To add or revise
     an entry, edit the relevant segment file and re-run bin/extract-findings.

     default. Only segments with genuinely distinctive results contribute. -->

This catalog surfaces the framework's distinctive results, organized by section.
Each entry is the segment's own self-assessment of novelty, impact, and a
framing for non-specialists, followed by a link to the segment for derivation,
scope, and caveats.
